name: Mocha Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heatproof bowl set over simmering water, melt chocolate with coffee liqueur and instant coffee granules. Stir until smooth.
2. Remove from heat; stir in brown sugar until dissolved.
3. Stir in corn syrup, eggs, butter, vanilla, salt, and chopped pecans.
4. Pour filling into pie shell; arrange pecan halves decoratively on top.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes, or until edges feel set but center still jiggles slightly. Let cool on wire rack before serving.
